draft.subject: 30-second review of NYC Dental Care's homepage
draft.body:
Hi NYC Dental Care team,

I run MehyarSoft LLC — founder-led consulting that helps local and service businesses stop losing customers to weak websites and slow follow-up. I'm a Senior software engineer in NYC.

I checked nycdentalcarecenter.com briefly and noticed your homepage failed to load when I checked.
If those sound like the kind of small leaks that quietly cost calls, leads, or bookings, that's the exact kind of audit I do for $150 — a written leak map with the smallest useful next step, no agency theater.

Want me to send the report? Happy to share the PDF and a few screenshots.

— Mehyar Swelim
MehyarSoft LLC
https://mehyar.us · info@mehyar.us
Unsubscribe: https://mehyar.us/unsubscribe

draft.subject: small thing I noticed on Big Apple Renovations's site
draft.body:
Hi Big Apple Renovations team,

I run MehyarSoft LLC — founder-led consulting that helps local and service businesses stop losing customers to weak websites and slow follow-up. I'm a Senior software engineer in NYC.

I checked bigapplerenovations.com briefly and noticed your phone number isn't clickable to call on a phone; your site doesn't expose an email contact, and your site doesn't show a physical address (a Google ranking + trust killer).
If those sound like the kind of small leaks that quietly cost calls, leads, or bookings, that's the exact kind of audit I do for $150 — a written leak map with the smallest useful next step, no agency theater.
